module.name: no-flag-argument
module.description: Disallow boolean flag arguments in function declarations; prefer explicit methods or command objects.

scenarios.name: should allow a function with only non-boolean parameters
scenarios.given: a function accepting string and number parameters
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the function declaration

scenarios.name: should allow a function with zero parameters
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the function declaration

scenarios.name: should report a function parameter typed as boolean
scenarios.given: a function declaration with a parameter typed as boolean
scenarios.then: a noFlagArgument violation is reported on the parameter

scenarios.name: should report an arrow function with a boolean flag parameter
scenarios.given: an arrow function with a boolean parameter
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the arrow function
